concerns.text: SC-008 requires 'A validation script MUST be included in docs/reproducibility/ that automates this check' for tie-breaking rules. The plan.md and quickstart.md do not explicitly document this validation script as a deliverable. Quickstart mentions 'pytest tests/contract/' but does not specify the tie-breaking validation script. This is a spec-to-plan coverage gap.

SC-006 contains incomplete text: 'of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated.' The percentage threshold is missing. This is a spec authoring defect that prevents clear implementation verification.
SC-012 contains incomplete text: 'If KnotInfo reference coverage of the dataset.' The percentage threshold is missing. This is a spec authoring defect that prevents clear implementation verification.
